status.description: Status is the publish result status.

pr_url.description: PRURL is the pull request URL when one is available.

branch.description: Branch is the candidate branch name when one is available.

base.description: Base is the base branch name when one is available.

commit.description: Commit is the pushed commit SHA when one is available.

reason.description: Reason is the human-readable explanation attached to the evidence record.

EvidencePublishInput.description: EvidencePublishInput is the JSON input consumed by `harness evidence submit --kind publish`.

title: Publish evidence input
description: JSON input consumed by `harness evidence submit --kind publish`.
